summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Admin Pricing CRUD, Create Driver, and Order Status Control features. All 24 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI testing verified Pricing Management tab with full CRUD operations, Create Driver modal, and Order Status Change modal.

backend: POST /api/admin/drivers - Create driver with query params
frontend: Admin Dashboard - Login successful with admin credentials
Admin Dashboard - Pricing tab in sidebar navigation (data-testid='nav-pricing')
Pricing Management - Page loads with pricing cards grid
Pricing Management - Shows 4 pricing types (Next-Day, Same-Day, Priority, Refrigerated)
Pricing Management - Add Pricing button (data-testid='create-pricing-btn')
Pricing Management - Create modal with Delivery Type dropdown
Pricing Management - Create modal with Name input (data-testid='pricing-name-input')
Pricing Management - Create modal with Base Price input (data-testid='pricing-price-input')
Pricing Management - Create modal with Window Start/End time inputs
Pricing Management - Create modal with Add-on Fee toggle
Pricing Management - Create modal with Active toggle
Pricing Management - Edit button on each pricing card
Pricing Management - Edit modal pre-fills existing data
Pricing Management - Toggle button (data-testid='toggle-pricing-{id}')
Pricing Management - Toggle shows toast notification
Pricing Management - Delete button on each pricing card
Pricing Management - Show Inactive toggle
Pricing Management - Refresh button (data-testid='refresh-pricing-btn')
Drivers Management - Add Driver button
Drivers Management - Create New Driver modal with all fields
Orders Management - Orders table with status badges
Orders Management - Action dropdown (View Details, Change Status, Cancel Order)
Orders Management - Change Order Status modal
Orders Management - Status dropdown with all status options
Orders Management - Notes (Optional) textarea
Orders Management - Update Status button

critical_code_review_comments: All data-testid attributes are properly implemented for Pricing Management components
Admin Create Driver endpoint correctly uses query params as designed
Pricing CRUD operations (Create, Read, Update, Delete, Toggle) all working correctly
Admin has full control over order status with all valid statuses available
Toggle pricing active/inactive works with proper toast notifications
Pricing cards display all relevant info: name, type badge, price, time windows, status
seed_data_creation: Created test pricing configurations during testing (cleaned up after tests)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin Pricing Management, Create Driver, and Order Status Control features are fully functional. Pricing tab at /admin shows cards for Next-Day ($5.99), Same-Day ($9.99), Priority ($14.99), and Refrigerated Fee ($3.00 add-on). Admin can create/edit/delete/toggle pricing. Create Driver uses query params. Order status can be changed via Orders tab -> Action dropdown -> Change Status modal.

mocked_apis.Google Maps API: Not configured - geocoding returns mock data

admin_create_driver.method: Query params (email, password, first_name, last_name, phone, vehicle_type, vehicle_number, license_number)
admin_create_driver.ui_location: Admin Dashboard -> Drivers tab -> Add Driver button

admin_order_status.ui_location: Admin Dashboard -> Orders tab -> Action dropdown -> Change Status
